mnemonics: PANdas: Powerful Data Analysis, Numerical & Structured
Think of DataFrames as a spreadsheet in code
Remember: iloc is integer-based, loc is label-based
keyPoints: DataFrames are the primary data structure, like a table with rows and columns
Series are one-dimensional arrays, like a single column from a DataFrame
Use loc and iloc for selecting data by label or integer index respectively
The groupby method is essential for splitting data into groups for analysis
Handling missing data is crucial; use methods like dropna() and fillna()
commonMistakes: Forgetting to use inplace=True when wanting to modify the DataFrame directly
Not setting the index properly for time series data
Using Python loops instead of vectorized pandas operations for better performance
Misunderstanding the difference between copying (copy()) and viewing data
